headings.usage: All section titles, hero text, and major calls to action. Use uppercase for maximum impact.

body.usage: Paragraphs, UI elements, form labels, data tables.

typography.instructions: Import 'Oswald' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts in index.css.

colors.theme_strategy: Dark Mode Only. No light mode toggle. The brand lives in the shadows and the spotlight.

marketing_pages.description: Asymmetrical layouts. Never simple 3-column grids. Use col-span-2 vs col-span-1 to create rhythm.
marketing_pages.spacing: Loose. minimum py-24 for sections. Use negative space to frame content.

admin_dashboard.description: Strict, functional, information-dense. Use borders to separate data, not whitespace.
admin_dashboard.spacing: Compact. p-4 or p-6 for cards.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black hover:bg-[#FFD700] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none skew-x-[-10deg] px-8 py-4 transition-all hover:skew-x-0
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-[#D4AF37] hover:text-[#D4AF37] rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-wider transition-all

cards.marketing: bg-[#121212] border border-white/5 hover:border-[#D4AF37]/50 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.style: bg-black/50 border-white/10 focus:border-[#D4AF37] text-white placeholder:text-white/20 rounded-none h-12

motion.text_reveal: Staggered character reveal for 'KING CHOREOGRAPHY' headings.
motion.scroll_reveal: Elements fade in and move up (y: 20 -> 0) on scroll.
motion.hover_effects: Images scale slightly (1.05) and desaturate -> saturate on hover.

hero_background.usage: Home page Hero Section background with heavy dark overlay

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME: Force Dark Mode. Do not implement a light mode toggle. Set 'dark' class on HTML tag permanently.
2. FONTS: Add Google Fonts link to public/index.html for 'Oswald' and 'Manrope'.
3. SHADCN: When installing Shadcn components, override the default 'slate' or 'zinc' colors with our custom #0A0A0A palette in tailwind.config.js.
4. BORDERS: Use extremely subtle borders (white/10) to separate sections. Avoid heavy lines.
5. FORMS: All forms (Apply/Submit) must look premium. No default browser inputs. Use custom styled Shadcn inputs.
6. MOBILE: Ensure the 'Apply' and 'Submit' buttons are always accessible on mobile (sticky bottom bar if needed).
7. UNIVERSAL: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid #0A0A0A or #121212. Gradients are for TEXT and ACCENTS only.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
